Quality Education.reason: Focus on academic writing skills and literacy aligns with Target 4.6 ('achieve literacy and numeracy').
The course is a core component of tertiary education (Target 4.3) and explicitly develops literacy and relevant skills for effective learning (Targets 4.4, 4.6).

gain a foundational understanding of English composition

Decent Work and Economic Growth.reason: The course develops advanced writing and communication skills, which are foundational for securing productive employment and decent work (Target 8.5).

evidence: search online sources, learn to cite them

Reduced Inequalities.reason: By providing access to higher education and essential communication skills, the course indirectly promotes social and economic inclusion and equal opportunity (Targets 10.2, 10.3).

Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: The course teaches skills for writing an 'Argumentative Essay' and developing an 'objective approach,' which are vital for participatory decision-making and public discourse (Target 16.7).
